about.description: We try to apply permanence to a world that is always changing. We build lighthouses on shorelines that are constantly shifting. We store memories between electrical charged that is always dispersing. We pin names on creatures that are always evolving. Decay reminds us that nothing is ever really one thing. It’s only in the process of becoming something else. A house is just material rearranged. A nest to hold us for a season. From environment to home and back again. Decay is what happens when we are standing still, so we don’t stand still. Decay happens in the silence, so we fill it with noise. Decay leaves room for uncertainty, so we fill in the gaps.

projects.title: Project Rilke x Riso
projects.description: Plantasia- Using texts from the poet Rilke, and the medium Riso. I experiment with printing on riso using the analogue scanner. Etc etc etc

wormhole.title: Poem 1
wormhole.content:
My body
is a language 
of memory.
